name: government-mcp
description: World governments & immigration MCP: how governments work by region (US, Europe/EU+UK, Middle East, Japan, Russia, South America), and the practical side of moving between them — immigration/residency paths, work permits, and travel/entry visas. Rules change fast and are high-stakes, so it explains the stable structure and routes every current specific to research + official sources, and always defers serious cases to a licensed immigration lawyer. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
